title: Advertising Mission and Vision
content:
Advertising Mission and Vision

Mission and Vision of Advertising Department

Mission:

The main mission of the department is to train qualified professionals in the field. Advertising Department maintains its curriculum in cooperation with the sector and has adopted the principle and mission of carrying out the most appropriate curriculum for education that is considered by the needs of the sector. The students in the department are equipped with the practical knowledge required by the sector while gaining the scientific basis of university education on the one part.

Vision:

With the academic staff experts in their fields internationally, in the near future, Advertising Department aims to become recognized not only in Turkey but is preparing to take its place among the world's respected programs in this area. It is our main vision that our graduates who prepare for the profession with a strong synthesis of practical and theoretical education will come forward in the sector with the projects and performances they will put forth in the next few years.
